overall.description: A first-person exploration of a medieval castle courtyard at night during a storm. The player walks across a grassy field toward illuminated banner towers, passes a lamp post as rain begins to fall, and continues along the castle walls with mountains visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle courtyard with banner towers and central lamp post

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the grassy courtyard toward the illuminated lamp post and castle towers

entered.detail: tall stone towers with pointed roofs and hanging banners
high stone curtain wall with crenellations
open grass field forming the castle grounds
tall iron lamp post with glowing lantern on top
vertical banners suspended between the towers

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a stormy night in a medieval castle courtyard. The camera approaches a central lamp post across the grassy field, with tall banner towers rising in the distance and a stone wall running along the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle courtyard with wooden platform and lamp post

events.description: rain begins to fall, visible as streaks in the lamplight and across the scene

agents.ego_description: circling around the lamp post and wooden platform while rain begins to fall

entered.detail: raised wooden deck surrounding the base of the lamp post
dark mountain range becoming visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The camera circles the illuminated lamp post and its wooden platform as rain begins to fall. The castle towers shift to the left while distant mountains emerge on the horizon, and the stone wall remains visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle perimeter with stormy mountain backdrop

agents.ego_description: walking along the castle wall with the stormy mountains visible in the background

segments.scene_description: Moving along the castle perimeter, the camera travels past the stone wall now close on the right, with the stormy mountain range dominating the center background. Rain continues to fall across the darkened landscape as the castle towers recede to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a stormy medieval courtyard that shifts from a focused approach toward a light source to a wide view of a desolate mountain perimeter. It begins by advancing across a grassy field toward a central lamp post, with tall banner towers rising in the distance and a stone wall bordering the right. As the camera circles the illuminated wooden platform of the lamp post, rain begins to fall and the perspective shifts, causing the towers to move left while distant mountains emerge on the horizon. The scene then expands as the camera travels along the castle perimeter, bringing the stone wall close on the right while the stormy mountain range comes to dominate the center background. Finally, the camera continues its path through the rain as the castle towers recede into the distance on the left.
